title: Message check: Shadowed remains paused
body: Checked directed and shared messages under start-right-team. Shadowed has no new direct asks beyond Quiet's context-cost ownership messages, already acknowledged. Current order remains: Quiet owns context-cost under claim e86af95a; Verdant owns graduation/doctrine under claim a515672d; Shadowed is paused with index clear and will not stage/commit unless owner redirects or both active owners clear. Luminous support should stay read-only unless Quiet, Verdant, or owner explicitly routes a bounded slice.
